companies.name: Simac Masic bv
companies.shortDescription:
Simac Masic bv. Simac Masic bv is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Simac is a company that specializes in the realization of machine vision systems for quality control during production in the pharmaceutical industry. Simac Masic bv employs 41 people (-8.1% YoY, -5 people). Headquartered in heerlen, Netherlands.
[...]
Simac Masic is a smart technology company based in the Netherlands. Our focus is on high-tech visual inspection systems, Pharmacy Automation, Industrial Automation, Contract Manufacturing and Reliability test systems. We serve customers mainly in the pharmaceutical and medical industry.
[...]
We build specialised equipment as turn-key projects in industrial manufacturing environments. As a key competence, we realize advanced machine vision systems for quality control during production, based on automated visual inspection.
[...]
Furthermore, we provide customer specific mechanical fabrication, assembly and maintenance services. Finally, as a distributor and trading company we supply production equipment to the semiconductor, automotive and medical-pharmaceutical industries worldwide.
[...]
Our highly specialized service team can be deployed worldwide for installation, maintenance and emergency support. Furthermore we have an in-house service center, a mechanical tool shop and a calibration service.
[...]
- Industry: Automation Machinery Manufacturing

companies.name: COMVIS
companies.shortDescription:
COMVIS. # COMVIS (ComVis ApS)

COMVIS is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. COMVIS is a company that provides automated fabric inspection systems and software for surface defect detection. They offer a range of products including VIU™ and Profiler™, which are used for narrow and wide fabrics, technical textiles, and other surfaces. COMVIS employs 7 people. Headquartered in Netherlands, with presence in United Kingdom.

## About
COMVIS is specialized in development of software and inspection systems for automated surface inspection. With over 20 years of experience, we provide our customers flexible automated solutions for quality determination of all kinds of surfaces. For instance woven and non-woven materials, (industrial) fabrics, filters, sieves, paper and foils.

With the use of our vision inspection systems, equipped with COMVIS Texplorer™ software, millions of meters of material is inspected for spots, stains, scratches, warp and weft defects, broken filaments, edge and other deviations in the surface.

## Company Details

companies.shortDescription:
GDO Precision Technology. GDO Precision Technology is a Machinery Manufacturing company. GDO is a specialist machine builder for industrial automation and vision inspection. GDO Precision Technology employs 37 people, founded in 2003. Headquartered in Netherlands, operates in 6 countries (including Germany, France, Italy, Portugal, and Austria).
[...]
GDO B.V. Precision Technology is a specialist in production automation and inspection systems, situated in Eygelshoven (GDO B.V.), the Netherlands and Baden-Baden (D) . GDO B.V was established in 1956. After a management buy-out in 2003 GDO B.V. became a private organization offering complete solutions to the automotive and medical industry, with the policy one-stop shopping for automation solutions in combination with inspection systems. At the moment GDO B.V. has about 100 employees divided over the four departments Machinery, Vision Systems, Tooling, and Testing and Diagnostics. Over the years GDO B.V. has become an experienced partner of numerous international manufacturers within the automotive and life science industry. Thanks to the unique combination of creative engineering, in-house manufacturing and inspection expertise, GDO B.V. has made an essential contribution to customers successes.
